summary: P0 HOTFIX - KYC Admin Review Actions VERIFIED. All three review actions (APPROVE, NEEDS_MORE_INFO, REJECT) work correctly. ReviewKYC model now accepts review_notes, assigned_iban, assigned_bic fields. KYCService.review_application() properly validates IBAN/BIC on approval and creates bank accounts.

hotfix_validation.fix_description: Added review_notes, assigned_iban, assigned_bic to ReviewKYC model (Line 303-308). Rewrote review endpoint to use KYCService.review_application() (Line 310-340).
evidence: ✓ NEEDS_MORE_INFO action works without IBAN/BIC - returns 200 OK
✓ REJECT action works without IBAN/BIC - returns 200 OK
✓ APPROVE without IBAN correctly returns 400 'IBAN is required to approve KYC'
✓ APPROVE with IBAN but no BIC correctly returns 400 'BIC/SWIFT is required to approve KYC'
✓ APPROVE with valid IBAN (IT60X0542811101000000123456) and BIC (UNICRITM) returns 200 OK
✓ User status changes from PENDING to ACTIVE after KYC approval
✓ KYC Queue page loads correctly showing pending applications
✓ KYC review form displays IBAN, BIC, Decision buttons, Review Notes fields

key_validations: ✓ Approve with IBAN but no BIC correctly rejected (400)
✓ ReviewKYC model accepts new fields without 422 validation error

kyc_queue.empty_state: ✓ Shows 'No pending applications' when queue is empty
kyc_queue.queue_user_button: ✓ '+ Queue User' button visible and clickable

other_admin_pages.users: ✓ Users page loads with 92 users, TAX flags displayed
other_admin_pages.accounts: ✓ Accounts page loads without .map error, shows 75 accounts with IBAN/BIC
other_admin_pages.support_tickets: ✓ Support Tickets page loads with 76 tickets, thread visible after click
other_admin_pages.card_requests: ✓ Card Requests page loads with 7 requests

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ ReviewKYC model correctly updated with optional review_notes, assigned_iban, assigned_bic fields
✓ Review endpoint now properly delegates to KYCService.review_application() which handles all business logic
✓ IBAN validation regex pattern is correct: ^[A-Z]{2}[A-Z0-9]{13,32}$
✓ BIC validation regex pattern is correct: ^[A-Z]{4}[A-Z]{2}[A-Z0-9]{2}([A-Z0-9]{3})?$
✓ Account creation flow handles both new accounts and existing accounts without duplicate key errors
✓ User status is updated to ACTIVE only after successful account creation/update

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 KYC-related tests passed, 3 unrelated endpoint path failures)

seed_data_creation: Created test user kyctest_1771945253@emergent.test via /api/v1/auth/signup, queued for KYC via /api/v1/admin/kyc/queue-user, tested all review actions
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 KYC Admin Review Hotfix verified. The ReviewKYC Pydantic model now includes review_notes, assigned_iban, assigned_bic fields. The /admin/kyc/{id}/review endpoint uses KYCService.review_application() which properly validates IBAN/BIC format on approval and creates bank accounts. Test user kyctest_1771945253@emergent.test was created and approved with IBAN IT60X0542811101000000123456 and BIC UNICRITM. All admin pages (Users, Accounts, Transfers Queue, Support Tickets, Card Requests) load correctly.
